body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `CuArrays` package from `1.7.3` to `1.7.3, 2.0`.

This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.

Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry. It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for "CuArrays" to "2.0"

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `CUDAnative` package from `2.10.2` to `2.10.2, 3.0`.

This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.

Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry. It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for "CUDAnative" to "3.0"
